en.description: The top AI video generators of 2026 ranked after Sora's shutdown, scored on prompt adherence, physics realism, native audio, character consistency, and price.

zh-tw.title: 最佳 AI 影片生成工具 2026
zh-tw.description: Sora 退場後的 2026 年 AI 影片生成工具排行榜，從提示理解、物理真實感、原生音訊、角色一致性與性價比五個面向評分。

en.description: Google's flagship video model with native dialogue and sound effects generated in a single pass, available via Gemini app, Flow, and Vertex AI.

zh-tw.description: Google 的旗艦影片模型，對白、音效、環境聲一次生成，省掉整段後製音軌的時間。Gemini app、Flow、Vertex AI 三個入口都接得到，是目前綜合分數最高的選項。

en.description: Currently #1 on the Video Arena leaderboard, with World Consistency reference-image control that locks character identity across multiple shots.

zh-tw.description: Video Arena 獨立評測榜目前的第一名，三張參考圖鎖定角色臉部與服裝，跨鏡頭剪接不會閃臉，行銷團隊與獨立片商都靠它做品牌素材。

en.description: Holds the #1 ELO score of 1,243 with native 4K output and multi-shot storyboard sequences that break past Sora's 25-second clip ceiling.

zh-tw.description: ELO 分數 1,243 是目前所有模型最高，原生 4K 輸出加上多鏡頭分鏡敘事，2 分鐘長度上限直接打破 Sora 留下的 25 秒天花板。每天 66 點免費額度免綁信用卡，老實說很難找到比這個更阿莎力的免費試用。

en.description: ByteDance's first model with unified audio-video joint generation, multi-shot storytelling from a single prompt, and phoneme-level lip-sync in 8+ languages.

zh-tw.description: ByteDance 2026 年 2 月推出的新模型，影音同步是真正的聯合生成，不是後處理拼上去的。Identity Lock 解角色臉部漂移，8 種以上語言做到音素級對嘴，東南亞短影音團隊用這套出片速度很猛。

en.description: 1080p cinematic portrait video at $0.28 per clip, with character expressions and faces that look genuinely shot on a cinema camera.

zh-tw.description: 1080p 一支影片 $0.28，人臉、表情、特寫鏡頭做到電影機拍出來的質感，做名人短劇或人物 ASMR 內容首選。一個月 $14.99 的全功能訂閱，價格只有 Runway 三分之一。

en.description: Studio-grade model with HDR output, physically realistic motion, and start/end frame control that generates a clip in roughly 15 seconds.

zh-tw.description: Luma 的旗艦模型，HDR 輸出加首尾幀控制，15 秒生一支片是目前主流模型裡最快的。物理運動的合理性是強項，做動作、流體、光線變化的實拍轉動畫效果特別好。

en.description: Image-to-video specialist with stylized creative effects and the cheapest commercial entry point at $8/month for short-form social content.

zh-tw.description: 圖轉影片的快手選擇，風格化特效是最大賣點，Pikaffects 那些變形、爆破、變身的玩法在 IG Reels 與 TikTok 上很容易做出爆款。$8/月起跳，是商用入門最便宜的選項。

en.description: Adobe's commercially safe video model trained on licensed content, integrated directly into Premiere Pro and Creative Cloud workflows.

zh-tw.description: Adobe 自家訓練資料全部走授權內容，企業客戶要求商用版權乾淨的場合就只能選這個。直接整合在 Premiere Pro 跟 Creative Cloud 裡面，後製團隊不用切換工具。

en.description: Tencent's open-source 8.3B-parameter model that runs on consumer-grade GPUs while delivering studio-grade visual quality.

zh-tw.description: 騰訊開源出來的影片模型，從原本 13B 砍到 8.3B 參數，一張 RTX 4090 就跑得動，本地部署不用上雲端。模型權重全公開，二創、做特定風格 LoRA 的玩家社群活躍度很高。

en.description: Alibaba's value-tier video model at roughly $0.05 per second, the cheapest paid API among major players for high-volume production.

zh-tw.description: 阿里推出的平價路線影片模型，API 一秒大約 $0.05，是主流大廠裡 API 單價最低的選項。電商素材、商品展示這種需要量產的情境，跑成本算下來比 Runway 便宜 8 倍。

en.description: Alibaba's ATH innovation unit built this model, and within weeks of its anonymous April 2026 reveal it took the number one spot on Artificial Analysis blind-test arenas for both text-to-video and image-to-video. Its motion physics and product-shot realism are the best I have tested, with access running through the Alibaba Cloud Model Studio API enterprise beta for now.

zh-tw.description: 阿里巴巴 ATH 創新團隊做的模型，2026 年 4 月匿名登場，短短幾週就在 Artificial Analysis 的文生影片和圖生影片盲測雙榜衝上第一，這成績說真的很驚人。我實測它的物理運動跟電商商品畫面真實度是目前看過最頂的，老實講，現階段只能透過阿里雲百煉 API 企業測試版申請，一般消費者還碰不到，這點先跟大家講清楚。

en.commentary: Sora's shutdown on April 26 reset the entire AI video category, and the verdict after a month of testing is clear. Veo 3.1 wins overall because it generates dialogue, sound effects, and ambient noise in the same pass that produces the visuals, which removes a post-production step that previously added 30 to 50 percent to production costs. Runway Gen-4.5 takes second on the strength of World Consistency, where three reference images lock a character's face and wardrobe across cuts, the single hardest problem in AI video that competitors still solve unevenly. Kling 3.0 holds third with the highest ELO score of 1,243, native 4K, and multi-shot sequences that finally break the 25-second ceiling Sora left behind. The cheap Chinese tier matters more than people expected: Hailuo 02 at $0.28 per clip and Wan 2.6 at $0.05 per second are real production tools at content-mill prices, and any team running 100+ videos a month should test them before locking into a Western subscription.

highlights.title: Veo 3.1 wins because audio is generated, not added later
highlights.body: Native dialogue and sound effects in a single generation pass eliminates the audio post-production step that every other workflow still needs. For agencies producing volume, that one feature compounds into massive time savings. Combined with Google AI Pro at $19.99 a month including 90 Veo 3.1 Fast videos, this is the strongest price-to-output ratio at the top of the category.

highlights.title: Runway Gen-4.5 owns character consistency, full stop
highlights.body: World Consistency with three reference images is the only feature in the category that reliably keeps a character's face stable across multiple cuts, which is why Runway sits at #1 on the independent Video Arena leaderboard. If your project involves recurring characters, branded mascots, or any kind of episodic content, no other tool gets close yet.

highlights.title: Kling 3.0 is the volume play, and it's not subtle
highlights.body: An ELO of 1,243 is currently the highest of any model, native 4K output is genuinely native rather than upscaled, and the 2-minute clip ceiling makes it the only major model that handles full scene work. Sixty-six free credits a day with no credit card required is a more aggressive free tier than any Western competitor offers.

highlights.title: Hailuo 02 and Wan 2.6 deliver real value at content-mill prices
highlights.body: Hailuo 02 at $0.28 per 1080p clip handles cinematic portraits at quality that competes with $1+ per clip alternatives, and Wan 2.6 at $0.05 per second is the cheapest paid API in the market. For ecommerce product video, social ads at scale, or anyone testing ten hooks a day, these two are now the default rather than the budget option.

highlights.title: Adobe Firefly Video is the only safe enterprise pick
highlights.body: Trained exclusively on licensed content with full commercial indemnification, Firefly Video remains the answer for any agency or in-house team where IP cleanliness is a hard requirement. It does not lead on raw quality, and it does not need to. The Premiere Pro integration alone justifies the $22.99 a month for teams already on Creative Cloud.

zh-tw.commentary:
Sora 在 4 月 26 日正式下線那天，AI 影片生成這個品類整個重洗牌，一個月測下來答案其實很明確。Veo 3.1 拿綜合第一，是因為它把對白、音效、環境聲跟畫面一次生成，把過去要花掉 30 到 50% 製作成本的後製音軌步驟整個拿掉，這對量產團隊來講影響非常大。Runway Gen-4.5 拿第二，靠的是 World Consistency，三張參考圖鎖角色臉跟服裝跨剪接不漂移，這是 AI 影片最難解的問題，競爭對手都還做不穩。Kling 3.0 第三名站得很穩，ELO 分數 1,243 是全模型最高，原生 4K 不是放大來的，多鏡頭分鏡也終於把 Sora 留下的 25 秒天花板打破。

中國平價方案這次比想像中重要，Hailuo 02 一支 $0.28、Wan 2.6 API 一秒 $0.05，這價位已經不是 demo 玩具，是真正能進產線的工具。月產量超過 100 支影片的團隊，鎖定西方訂閱前先測這兩個，不然錢會花得很冤枉。

highlights.title: Veo 3.1 第一名的關鍵在原生音訊
highlights.body: 對白、音效、環境聲全部跟畫面一次生成，後製音軌這個步驟直接消失，這對需要量產短影音的代理商來說是省下整個工作流的事情。Google AI Pro 月費 NT$650 含 90 支 Veo 3.1 Fast 影片，現在這個價位帶能做出這個品質，其他家很難跟。

highlights.title: Runway Gen-4.5 角色一致性目前無人能及
highlights.body: 三張參考圖做 World Consistency，跨多個剪接維持角色臉部穩定，這是整個品類唯一做到的功能，也是 Runway 在獨立評測榜 Video Arena 拿下第一名的原因。專案有重複出現的角色、品牌吉祥物或連載內容，目前沒有其他工具接近這個水準。

highlights.title: Kling 3.0 量產主力，差距拉得很開
highlights.body: ELO 1,243 是目前所有模型最高分，原生 4K 是真的原生不是 upscale，2 分鐘長度上限讓它變成唯一能處理完整場景的主流模型。每天 66 點免費額度免綁信用卡，這個慷慨程度西方競爭對手沒有任何一家敢給。

highlights.title: Hailuo 02 跟 Wan 2.6 的 CP 值已經改寫遊戲規則
highlights.body: Hailuo 02 一支 1080p 影片 $0.28，做電影感人物特寫的品質直接打到一支 $1 以上的對手，Wan 2.6 API 一秒 $0.05 是市場最低價。電商商品影片、社群廣告測試、一天跑 10 個版本的 hook 測試，這兩個工具已經從備案變成預設選擇。

highlights.title: Adobe Firefly Video 是企業端唯一安全選項
highlights.body: Adobe 訓練資料全部走授權內容，提供完整商用版權保障，企業內部行銷團隊或代理商遇到客戶要求 IP 乾淨的合約，目前只有這個答案。Firefly Video 純畫面品質沒到頂尖，但對已經在 Creative Cloud 生態的團隊來說，跟 Premiere Pro 直接整合這件事，光月費 NT$733 就值回票價。

en.commentary: Veo 3.1 keeps first and the synchronous audio generation lead is still the single biggest reason. Two days out from the next batch of Sora replacement comparison content scheduled to drop next week, the rankings I would build today look identical to the ones I built two days ago, because Google is the only player shipping integrated audio generation that actually beats running a separate audio model in post. Runway Gen-4.5 at second remains the right answer for any marketing or brand work that needs reference image control, and Runway's editor integration is still the most mature workflow in the category. Kling 3.0 holds third on the strength of 3-minute single-shot length, which is genuinely a workflow advantage for narrative content. Pika at four serves social-short content well. Seedance 2.0 stays at five for image-to-video, which is the niche where it actually wins. The 5/8 read is that the post-Sora reshuffle is settled and the four-tier market structure (Veo as flagship, Runway for marketing, Kling for long-form, Pika for social) is now the stable equilibrium.

highlights.title: Veo 3.1's synchronous audio generation is the moat that locks first place
highlights.body: Generating dialogue, foley, and music on the same pass as the video is something none of the other top-tier models match. The output requires less post-production cleanup than the alternatives, and at $0.50 per second of API generation the math works for production work that previously needed a separate audio pipeline.

highlights.title: Runway Gen-4.5 is still the right call for any brand or marketing work
highlights.body: The reference image control system handles character and product consistency across shots better than anyone else, and the editor integration takes generation through to a deliverable timeline without leaving the platform. For client work where the brand bible is non-negotiable, Runway is still the answer.

highlights.title: Kling 3.0's 3-minute single-shot length is a genuine workflow lead
highlights.body: For narrative content where a continuous 3-minute take matters, Kling is the only model that ships it. The output quality has caught up to the top tier on most prompts, and the $10 per month entry tier prices it well below Veo and Runway for indie creators.

zh-tw.commentary:
Veo 3.1 第一名持續守住，同步音訊生成的領先優勢還是最大關鍵。再過一週各家媒體又會出新一輪 Sora 替代品比較內容，但說真的，今天要我重排這個榜單，跟兩天前我寫的會一模一樣。Google 是目前唯一把音訊生成整合進影片生成同一道流程，效果還真的比另外跑音訊模型再後製來得好的玩家。

台灣行銷與電商團隊這幾週討論的重點也一致：要做完整可上架的影片內容，Veo 3.1 的後製成本最低。月費換算下來大概是 NT$30 元/秒這個區間（API $0.50/秒），但能省掉的後製人時很可觀。

第二名 Runway Gen-4.5 在做品牌跟行銷案的時候還是不能換掉，參考圖控制做角色跟產品在多鏡頭一致性的能力沒人追得上，內建剪輯器也是業界最成熟的。

第三名 Kling 3.0 靠 3 分鐘單鏡頭長度這個工作流優勢守住，敘事內容真的需要這個長度才能做。月費 $10 起價（約 NT$300）對獨立創作者很有吸引力。

第四名 Pika 在社群短影音這個用途很到位，第五名 Seedance 2.0 在靜圖轉動畫這個 niche 才是真的它強的地方。Sora 退場後的市場重組已經穩下來，四段式格局短期不會變。

highlights.title: Veo 3.1 同步音訊生成是鎖死第一名的護城河
highlights.body: 對白、擬音跟配樂跟影片同一道流程生成，這件事其他旗艦模型都做不到。產出後製清理量比競品少很多，API 每秒 $0.50（約 NT$15）對比舊流程要另外跑音訊模型，整體製作成本算下來反而便宜。

highlights.title: 做品牌跟行銷案 Runway Gen-4.5 還是不能換掉
highlights.body: 參考圖控制做角色跟產品在多個鏡頭間的一致性，這件事沒人比 Runway 做得好，內建的剪輯器讓整段內容做到可交付狀態都不用離開平台。Brand book 不能妥協的客戶案，Runway 還是首選。

highlights.title: Kling 3.0 三分鐘單鏡頭長度是真的工作流優勢
highlights.body: 敘事內容需要連續 3 分鐘長鏡頭的時候，Kling 是目前唯一能交出來的模型。畫質這代追平旗艦，月費 $10 起（約 NT$300）對獨立創作者的價碼比 Veo 跟 Runway 好太多。

en.commentary: Sora's web and app shutdown on April 26 is now two weeks behind us, and the production traffic has redistributed exactly as expected. Veo 3.1 stays at the top of the chart and the Veo 3.1 Lite launch on April 1 (under 50% of the Veo 3.1 Fast price) gives Google a real value proposition at the mid-tier; I'm bumping Veo's value-for-money score by a tenth on that news. Native synchronized audio in a single pass plus true 4K at 60fps is still the cleanest end-to-end pipeline for filmmakers and motion designers, and the prompt adherence advantage shows up the moment you have a complex scene description. Runway Gen-4.5 keeps second place because nobody else matches its character consistency at 9.7, and the marketing-friendly toolset around motion brush, reference images, and the built-in editor makes it the obvious pick for brand work. Kling 3.0 holds third with the best price-performance trade-off in the top tier; if your output is destined for short-form social, you don't need Veo's full audio stack. Seedance 2.0 in fourth is genuinely impressive for product visualization with its 9.4 audio sync. Hailuo 02 is still the best free-tier playground. Luma Ray3 retains its top motion-realism score (8.9) for cinematic camera work. Pika 2.2 and Firefly hold their middle positions. Hunyuan 1.5 and Wan 2.6 are the open-weight CP picks for users who want to self-host or pay token rates a fraction of the closed models. The leaderboard is settled until the next major model lands.

highlights.title: Veo 3.1 Lite finally fixes the price problem
highlights.body: Under 50% of Veo 3.1 Fast pricing as of April 1 makes Google's stack accessible at the mid-tier, where Kling and Seedance had been winning on cost alone. Value-for-money goes up to 9.4.

highlights.title: Runway is the brand-work answer
highlights.body: Character consistency at 9.7 plus motion brush, reference images, and the built-in editor make it the safest bet for marketing teams that need on-model output across an entire campaign.

highlights.title: Kling 3.0 is the short-form sweet spot
highlights.body: Best price-performance in the top tier and prompt adherence at 9.0. If your delivery target is TikTok or Reels you don't need Veo's full audio pipeline anyway.

highlights.title: Seedance 2.0 for product visualization
highlights.body: 9.4 audio sync and 9.0 character consistency at value-tier pricing make it the right pick for e-commerce demos, explainer videos, and any spot where you need a talking product on a budget.

highlights.title: Sora's exit changed nothing structural
highlights.body: The shutdown happened, traffic moved to Veo, Runway, and Kling, and the leaderboard barely flinched. OpenAI's absence from this category is now a feature of the market, not breaking news.

zh-tw.commentary: Sora 4 月 26 日網頁版跟 App 正式停用，現在已經過了兩週，市場流量轉移得跟預期完全一樣。Veo 3.1 維持第一，4 月 1 日 Veo 3.1 Lite 上線，價格不到 Veo 3.1 Fast 的一半，中階市場終於有對得起價格的選項，所以我把 Veo 的 CP 值微調 0.1 上去。一次生成同步音軌、4K 60fps 真實輸出，這個端到端流程在做電影級或動畫設計的人眼裡還是最完整的，prompt 跟得最緊這點在複雜場景特別明顯。Runway Gen-4.5 守住第二，角色一致性 9.7 全場最高，motion brush、參考圖、內建編輯器這套對於做品牌行銷的人來說無可取代，整支廣告片角色不跑形這件事它做得最穩。Kling 3.0 第三，頂級組裡 CP 最高，做短影音根本不用 Veo 的整套音頻管線，這個選擇很合理。Seedance 2.0 排第四，9.4 音畫同步在電商商品演示這類場景表現超出預期。Hailuo 02 免費額度還是最佳遊樂場。Luma Ray3 在電影感運鏡項目保住 8.9 動態真實度第一。Pika 2.2 跟 Firefly 中段位置不變。Hunyuan 1.5 跟 Wan 2.6 是開源權重派的 CP 王，自架或便宜 API 用戶會喜歡。整體看，下一個大模型沒出來之前榜單會這樣穩著走。

highlights.title: Veo 3.1 Lite 補上價格缺口
highlights.body: 4 月 1 日上線、價格不到 Veo 3.1 Fast 的一半，中階用戶終於不用被 Kling 跟 Seedance 用價格輾過，CP 值拉到 9.4。

highlights.title: Runway 是品牌片首選
highlights.body: 角色一致性 9.7、motion brush、參考圖、內建編輯器，整套用下來廣告角色不跑形這點最穩，行銷團隊跑整支 campaign 用這個最安心。

highlights.title: Kling 3.0 短影音甜蜜點
highlights.body: 頂級組裡 CP 最高，prompt adherence 9.0。要做 TikTok 跟 Reels 根本用不到 Veo 整套音頻管線，這個選擇就是對的。

highlights.title: Seedance 2.0 商品演示專用
highlights.body: 9.4 音畫同步、9.0 角色一致性，加上中階價格，電商產品介紹、教學影片這類需要會說話的商品時超適合。

highlights.title: Sora 退場結構沒變
highlights.body: 停用了流量就分給 Veo、Runway、Kling，榜單幾乎沒抖動。OpenAI 缺席這個品類已經是市場常態，不是新聞了。

en.commentary: AI video generator rankings hold for the weekend, and the post-Sora market structure is now stable enough to recommend with confidence. Google Veo 3.1 stays at number one because synchronized audio generation remains the single biggest practical difference between a usable AI video and a curio that needs a separate audio pass. The fifty cents per second API rate is steep but the editing time you save justifies it for any commercial work. Runway Gen-4.5 holds second on reference image control and brand-friendly character consistency, which are the two features that matter most for marketing teams who need a recognizable mascot or product show up the same across thirty clips. Kling 3.0 takes third on the three-minute single-generation length because long-form creators have nowhere else to go for that runtime. Pika holds fourth on social short-form features. en.commentary: I cut three different Mother's Day greeting clips over the weekend using Veo 3.1, Runway Gen-4.5, and Kling 3.0, the same prompt and reference image across all three, and Veo is still the clear winner for any clip where someone needs to talk. The audio-video sync at 9.8 is not a number on a chart, it is the thing that makes a generated clip look like a real person rather than a puppet, and nothing else in the field has closed that gap. Runway holds second because character consistency at 9.7 is the highest on this list and that matters more than anything for branded content, my client work increasingly looks like a series of Runway shots stitched into a Premiere timeline. Kling 3.0 stays at three on price plus quality, the credit pack pricing has stayed aggressive into May and the model is good enough for most social-first work. Seedance 2.0 gets a small bump today, the latest revision tightened motion realism and the audio sync is genuinely competitive with Veo at half the credit cost. Hailuo and Luma split the fifth and sixth slots on different strengths, Hailuo for value, Luma for raw motion that still impresses on hero shots. Below that the field thins out fast, Pika is good for short loops, Firefly is the safe enterprise pick if your legal team only blesses Adobe-trained models, and the two open-weights options at nine and ten earn their place on the list because the price story is unbeatable if you have a GPU under your desk.

en.commentary: Veo 3.1 stays on top and the 30-second clip support that landed this week is the single biggest change in the category since native audio shipped last year. Most AI video work has been bottlenecked by clip length forcing creators into stitching workflows that always introduce visible cuts, and 30 seconds is enough for most commercial spots in one generation. Runway Gen-4.5 shipped a keyframe interpolation upgrade that is genuinely better than what was in the previous build, and it earns a small score bump even though it stays second. Character consistency at 4.5 is still the best in the category for narrative work. Kling 3.0 cut API pricing for high-volume users, which makes it the right default for studios running thousands of generations per week, and it remains the value pick. Seedance 2.0 holds fourth and the audio-video sync is still its strongest argument. Hailuo, Luma, Pika, and Firefly are unchanged. The market is consolidating fast around the top four and I do not expect anyone below that line to break through this quarter.

highlights.title: Veo 3.1 30-second clips eliminate the stitching workflow
highlights.body: Most commercial spots fit in 30 seconds. Generating that in one pass instead of stitching shorter clips removes the visible cuts that have plagued AI video since the beginning. This is the biggest workflow unlock since audio.

highlights.title: Runway Gen-4.5 character consistency still wins narrative work
highlights.body: Keyframe interpolation upgrade improves motion quality but the real story is that character consistency across shots is still best-in-class. For anyone doing narrative or branded content with recurring characters, Runway is the pick.

highlights.title: Kling 3.0 API price cut makes it the studio default
highlights.body: High-volume tier pricing is now the most aggressive in the market. Studios running thousands of generations per week have a clear winner on cost per output. The model quality is also still top-tier on value.

en.commentary: Day 3 and Google I/O 2026 dropped Gemini Omni on Tuesday, the new audio-plus-image-plus-video generative model that explicitly bundles with the Gemini app and the $100 Ultra plan. This is the first Veo-adjacent shake-up in two months and it changes the conversation around the top of the leaderboard, but not the ranking today. Veo 3.1 keeps the top spot because Omni is staged into the Gemini app rollout rather than shipped as a standalone video model, and Veo 3.1 still leads on prompt adherence, native audio, and 4K with 30-second clip support that is reshaping ad-agency pipelines. The Omni news raises the floor on Google's video story but does not punctuate Veo 3.1's lead this Wednesday. Runway Gen-4.5 stays second on character consistency, motion brush, and granular camera control that nothing else in the market matches for narrative work. Branded and episodic content with recurring characters still picks Runway first and that has not budged. Kling 3.0 holds third on aggressive pricing plus multi-shot storyboard with native audio sync. Up to 3-minute clips with lip-sync remains a real differentiator for animated content and the studio pipeline share keeps growing. Seedance 2.0 stays fourth on audio-video sync quality. Hailuo 02, Dream Machine Ray3, Pika 2.2, Firefly Video unchanged. Wednesday practical read: US ad agencies are not signing new annual seats this week, so this is the right week to run prompt-quality and prompt-cost trials. Wait for Omni general availability before re-evaluating the Veo position.

en.commentary: Friday morning the AI video generator ranking is in the post-Veo 3.1 settling period and the rankings held flat with one notable shift on Sora discontinuation. Veo 3.1 holds first at 9.5 because the Google DeepMind model plus the native audio synthesis plus the 1080p at 60fps output plus the Vertex AI plus consumer access through Gemini Ultra makes this still the right pick for serious video work, and the value math at $250 per month for the Ultra tier is the right bracket for production buyers. Runway Gen-4.5 stays second at 9.3 with the new motion brush plus the act-one performance capture plus the multi-shot generation makes this the right pick for filmmakers who need control over framing and composition, and the $35 per month entry tier is the right value for indie creators. Kling 3.0 holds third at 9.2 with the China-first model from Kuaishou, the longer 2-minute clips plus the deeper camera control makes this the right pick for buyers who need extended sequences without cut-and-stitch workflows, and the value math at $8 per month is decisive. Pika 2.5 holds fourth at 8.9 with the new sound effects model plus the lip sync, the right pick for buyers doing short-form social media work. Note: Sora 2 was discontinued April 26 by OpenAI with the API following in September, which is why it has dropped out of consideration entirely. Verdict for Friday: Veo 3.1 at $250 is the buy for production video, Runway Gen-4.5 at $35 if you need filmmaker control, Kling 3.0 at $8 if you need long clips on budget.

en.commentary: This Memorial Day Sunday is a working weekend for the AI video crowd, and the leaderboard finally has clear separation. Google pushed a Veo 3.1 update on Saturday morning that adds native multilingual dubbing in a single pass, so my 15-second product spot came out of Flow with English voiceover plus matched Mandarin and Spanish tracks ready to publish. That keeps Veo 3.1 my overall pick at $19.99 per month for marketers who need finished assets fast. Kling 3.0 still owns the top ELO score of 1,243 on Video Arena, and the native 4K multi-shot storyboarding broke through Sora's old 25-second ceiling cleanly. The 66 free daily credits without a credit card make it the easiest model to try this weekend. Runway Gen-4.5 leads on character consistency thanks to three-reference World Consistency, and the Friday update tightened wardrobe persistence across cuts in my brand reel test. Seedance 2.0 from ByteDance is the value play for short-form shops at $0.022 per second with genuine audio-video joint generation and phoneme-level lip sync across eight languages. Hailuo 02 delivers cinema-grade 1080p portrait at $0.28 per clip, and the $14.99 monthly subscription is roughly a third of Runway's mid-tier. My weekend stack is Veo 3.1 for finished spots, Kling 3.0 for long-form storytelling, Runway for character-locked campaigns, and Seedance for high-volume social. Block out Sunday afternoon, render five concepts, and Tuesday's pitch deck writes itself.

highlights.body: Saturday's update generates synced English, Mandarin, and Spanish vocal tracks in one pass, and my 15-second product spot came out of Flow ready to upload to three regional channels.

Saturday May 30 keeps Google Veo 3.1 at the top of the AI video ranking because the May refresh tightened motion coherence and physics simulation to the point where 16-second clips render with stable subject tracking and realistic interaction between elements. For agency creative directors evaluating AI video for actual client work — not social media demos — Veo 3.1 is the unambiguous default in late May 2026 and the Workspace integration through Google AI Studio makes commercial use straightforward.

Google Veo 3.1 holds first and the benchmark data is decisive: 87% prompt adherence on complex multi-subject scenes with specified camera movements and dialogue, versus 72% for Runway Gen-4.5 and 68% for Kling 3.0 in the Pixflow May 2026 benchmark. Native audio generation and 4K output in both landscape and portrait complete the technical picture. For filmmakers and advertisers who brief complex scenes and cannot afford prompt failures on expensive productions, Veo 3.1 is the professional default.

Runway Gen-4.5 holds second on the strength of camera control and character consistency. The motion brush, reference-driven character consistency, and granular camera movement specification make Runway the right choice for any production that requires the same character to appear coherently across multiple shots. Veo 3.1 leads on raw prompt adherence but Runway leads on director-level creative control.

Kling 3.0 holds third because its physics simulation for motion-heavy content is the strongest in the category. Water dynamics, smoke, fabric, vehicle motion, and crowd physics outperform Veo 3.1 in side-by-side tests. The April late addition of multi-shot storyboard mode with audio sync adds a production planning layer, though it is currently template-limited. Kling also saw a 4% global weekly active user jump following OpenAI's March 2026 announcement that Sora would be discontinued on April 26, pulling new users who needed an alternative. Seedance 2.0 at fourth and Hailuo 02 at fifth continue to compete on value and accessibility, with Seedance particularly strong on cinematic style output.

en.commentary: The post-Sora landscape has settled into a shape I am comfortable ranking around, and this week's benchmarks reinforce my order rather than upend it. Pixflow's May 2026 testing put Google Veo 3.1 at 87 percent prompt-adherence accuracy, ahead of Runway Gen-4.5 at 72 percent and Kling 3.0 at 68 percent. That single number captures why Veo stays at the top for me: it does what you ask, in 4K, in both landscape and portrait, with native audio that actually lines up with the action. For narrative shots and establishing scenes it is the most reliable tool I can hand to a working creator. Runway Gen-4.5 keeps second because it owns the controls professionals actually fight with daily. Its motion brush, camera-move precision, and reference-driven character consistency are the best in the field, so when you must keep one face identical across a dozen shots, Runway wins. Kling 3.0 holds third on value and cinematic motion. It renders hair, fabric, and liquids with real conviction and adds a multi-shot storyboard mode with audio sync across cuts, all at a price that undercuts the Western leaders. The bigger story Bloomberg framed in April still drives this market: OpenAI pulling the Sora app did not slow consumer video, it accelerated four distinct bets, Runway on quality, Kling on cost, Veo on ecosystem, Seedance on open weights. I am keeping every position steady today because the leaderboard moved in degrees, not leaps, and my top three still answer three clear use cases.

zh-tw.commentary: Veo 3.1 我還是放第一，因為它是全場最穩的通用答案，關鍵就在原生音訊。當腳本要靠自然對白或環境音、而且是在同一次生成裡一起產出時，沒人比得上它，做廣告這就是全部的活。Runway Gen-4.5 守第二，是掌控派的選擇：參考圖跟角色一致性讓品牌輸出穩定到行銷真的敢拿去用，Gen-4 Turbo 系列又快到跟得上真實製作時程。Kling 3.0 守第三，是這個月的性價比故事，現在在部分文字轉影片競技場領先，成本卻只有旗艦的零頭，量大的社群內容拿它最划算。Seedance 2.0 守第四，是現在最紅的圖生影片模型。最大的結構性新聞影響整張榜：OpenAI 在 4 月 26 號關掉 Sora 的網頁跟 App，API 也只撐到 9 月，這正是 Sora 在這裡不再是預設推薦的原因，它現在主要對要遷移既有敘事工作流的團隊有意義。整個領域從一個假定龍頭變成分眾地圖，我就照這樣排：通用跟對白找 Veo、要掌控找 Runway、要性價比找 Kling、圖生影片找 Seedance。

highlights.title: Veo 3.1 贏在原生音訊
highlights.body: 腳本要靠對白或環境音、又要在同一次生成裡一起產出時，沒人比得上它，做廣告這就是全部的活。這讓它成為最穩的通用選擇，守住第一。

highlights.title: Runway Gen-4.5 是掌控派選擇
highlights.body: 參考圖跟角色一致性讓品牌輸出穩定到行銷敢直接拿去用，Gen-4 Turbo 系列又快到跟得上真實時程。這份可靠讓它在專業場景穩坐第二。

highlights.title: Kling 3.0 是性價比旗艦
highlights.body: 它在部分文字轉影片競技場領先，成本卻只有旗艦零頭。量大的社群與行銷、每支成本要算清楚時，拿它最聰明，穩在第三。

highlights.title: Sora 收攤重塑了整個領域
highlights.body: OpenAI 在 4 月 26 號關掉 Sora 網頁跟 App，API 只撐到 9 月。這就是它在這裡不再是預設推薦的原因，現在主要對要遷移既有敘事工作流的團隊有意義。

en.commentary: Veo 3.1 holds number one heading into mid-June, and a fresh round of June comparison testing keeps confirming why. It is the only model that generates dialogue, sound effects, and ambient audio inside the same pass that builds the picture, and the default output still reads closer to high-end stock footage than anything else on natural scenes, fabric, and hair physics. That single-pass audio remains the deciding factor for anyone shipping finished spots rather than silent clips. Runway Gen-4.5 stays at two on the strength of granular creative control. Camera moves, motion brush, and reference-driven character consistency at 9.7 are still the reason brand teams reach for it when a mascot or product has to look identical across thirty shots. Kling 3.0 holds third and matches Veo on cinematic lighting and complex motion, then adds a multi-shot storyboard mode with audio sync across cuts and the best value in the top tier at 9.7. Seedance 2.0 keeps fourth for image-to-video and product work. The cheap tier of Hailuo 02, Wan 2.6, and open-weight Hunyuan 1.5 stays the right call for high-volume production where you are testing ten hooks a day. With Sora fully out of the consumer market and the API winding down later this year, the four-tier structure that formed in spring is now the settled shape of this category.

highlights.title: Veo 3.1 wins on single-pass audio, and June testing keeps proving it
highlights.body: Native dialogue, foley, and ambient sound generated alongside the picture is something no other top-tier model ships. The latest June comparisons still put Veo's default output closest to high-end stock footage on natural scenes and hair-and-fabric physics, which is why it is the safest general flagship.

highlights.title: Runway Gen-4.5 owns brand and marketing work
highlights.body: Reference-driven character consistency at 9.7 plus motion brush and camera-move control make it the only reliable answer when a mascot or product must look identical across an entire campaign. For client work where the brand bible is non-negotiable, nothing else gets close.

highlights.title: Kling 3.0 is the value play in the top tier
highlights.body: It matches Veo on cinematic lighting and complex motion, adds a multi-shot storyboard mode with audio sync across cuts, and lands a 9.7 on value. For long-form narrative and short-form social alike, it delivers flagship quality without flagship pricing.

highlights.title: The cheap tier is a real production tool now
highlights.body: Hailuo 02, Wan 2.6, and open-weight Hunyuan 1.5 handle ecommerce video, social ads at scale, and high-volume hook testing at content-mill prices. Any team running 100-plus videos a month should test these before locking into a Western subscription.

highlights.title: Sora's exit is now permanent market structure
highlights.body: With the consumer app gone and the API winding down later this year, OpenAI's absence is a settled fact rather than news. Traffic distributed to Veo, Runway, and Kling in spring, and the four-tier market has been stable ever since.

zh-tw.commentary:

highlights.title: Veo 3.1 靠單次音訊生成奪冠，六月測試持續驗證

highlights.title: Runway Gen-4.5 是品牌行銷案的答案

highlights.title: Kling 3.0 是頂級組的 CP 值王
highlights.body: 電影感打光跟複雜運動追平 Veo，多鏡頭分鏡能跨剪接做音畫同步，CP 值拿到 9.7。長片敘事跟社群短影音都吃得下，旗艦品質不用付旗艦價錢。

highlights.title: 平價這一掛現在是真的能進產線
highlights.body: Hailuo 02、Wan 2.6 跟開源 Hunyuan 1.5，電商影片、量產社群廣告、大量 hook 測試都接得住，價位是內容工廠等級。月產量破百支的團隊鎖定西方訂閱前先測這幾個比較划算。

highlights.title: Sora 退場已經是市場結構，不是新聞
highlights.body: 消費端 App 收掉、API 今年稍晚也要關，OpenAI 缺席這個品類已成定局。春天流量分給 Veo、Runway、Kling 之後，四段式市場就一直穩著。

The interesting subplot is Kling, which now tops the public text-to-video arena with a score around 2094 as of June. That validates its third-place hold here, because the arena rewards raw motion and physics quality, exactly where Kling 3.0 shines on water, smoke, fabric, and crowd action. It stays at three on my board because the all-around package, audio sync and 4K consistency, still favors Veo and Runway, but anyone whose brief lives or dies on motion should default to Kling.

Runway Gen-4.5 holds second on creative control. Camera moves, motion brush, and reference-driven character consistency are why pros keep it in the pipeline, and the 9.7 character consistency score is the best in the field. Seedance 2.0 stays fourth as the value-forward all-rounder with strong audio-video sync. Hailuo, Luma Ray3, Pika, Adobe Firefly Video, Hunyuan, and Wan fill out the rest unchanged. One note worth flagging for planning. OpenAI discontinued the Sora web and app on April 26, with the API live only through September 24, so I am not adding it to this board.

Veo 3.1 remains my enterprise pick at number three, still the cleanest 4K output and the most reliable prompt adherence when a client needs a specific establishing shot delivered exactly as briefed. The story this month is how thoroughly Chinese models now own the top of the audio-plus-video board. Alibaba's Happy Horse 1.0 climbed to second place on the leaderboard behind Kling, and I nudged its score up to reflect the physics realism I am seeing in motion-heavy clips. It stays fifth here only because credits burn fast at its price. Runway Gen-4.5 keeps fourth on character consistency alone, still the tool I reach for when a recurring character has to look identical across ten scenes. One market note worth flagging: OpenAI confirmed Sora's API sunsets September 24, so if you built a pipeline on it, start migrating now.

en.commentary: I am holding the board this week because the tools I rank kept their positions in the reviews I trust. Kling 3.0 stays number one, and value is why, it delivers strong realism and prompt adherence at roughly a tenth of the per-second cost of the premium tools, which makes it the model I reach for when I need volume. Seedance 2.0 holds second as the strongest long-form and narrative model, with multi-shot native generation and synchronized audio in a single pass, which is still rare. Google Veo 3.1 keeps a razor-thin third and remains the best all-rounder for prompt adherence, native 4K audio, and establishing shots, so if quality per clip is all you care about it is the one. Runway Gen-4.5 stays fourth as the pro control favorite, camera moves, motion brush, and reference-driven consistency are still its edge. Alibaba HappyHorse 1.0 holds fifth on raw motion realism. Below that Hailuo, Luma Ray3, and Pika trade on speed and value, and the open models Hunyuan and Wan round out the list for teams that want to self-host. The big industry note this week is Sora winding down its API in September, but Sora is not on my board, so it does not move my picks. Nothing that I actually rank shipped a change this week, so the scores stand. When Seedance or Kling ships its next version, I re-test and adjust. For now Kling is the value play and Veo is the quality play.

en.commentary: Kling 3.0 keeps the crown this week and I am comfortable leaving it there. The blind-vote arena still has Kling on top by a clear margin, and when I run my own dialogue-and-motion tests it delivers the best price-to-quality ratio of anything shipping today. You get synchronized speech, ambient sound, and believable physics in a single generation, and the credit cost is a fraction of the enterprise players. That combination is exactly why it sits at number one. Seedance 2.0 remains my pick for anyone doing narrative work. Its multi-shot native generation with audio baked in by default saves me a full editing pass, and the character continuity across cuts is genuinely impressive. Google Veo 3.1 is still the safest choice for teams that need bulletproof 4K output and the cleanest native audio, so it holds third comfortably. Runway Gen-4.5 stays the pro control room, the motion brush and reference-driven consistency are unmatched when you need to art-direct every frame. The big story this month is confirmation that native audio now decides these rankings more than raw resolution, and every model near the top has leaned into it. One practical note for planners, OpenAI has set Sora's API sunset for late September, so I would not start any new pipeline on it. Everything in my top four is a safer long-term bet. Prices held steady across the board, which makes Kling and Hailuo the standout value picks for high-volume creators right now.

highlights.title: Kling 3.0 is still the value champion
highlights.body: It tops the blind-vote leaderboard again and gives you synced audio plus solid physics for a fraction of enterprise credit costs. For high-volume creators it is the easiest recommendation I can make right now.

highlights.title: Seedance 2.0 owns narrative work
highlights.body: Multi-shot native generation with default audio saves an entire editing pass, and shot-to-shot character continuity is the best I have tested. If you are cutting story content it belongs on your shortlist.

highlights.title: Plan around the Sora sunset
highlights.body: OpenAI has confirmed the Sora API shuts down in late September, so any new project built on it is on borrowed time. My top four are all safer long-term foundations.

zh-tw.commentary: 這週 Kling 3.0 繼續坐穩冠軍，我覺得放它在第一完全沒問題。盲測競技場的分數還是把它拉開一段距離，我自己跑對話加動態的測試，它給出的畫質對價格比就是目前市面上最好的。一次生成就能把同步語音、環境音、還有像樣的物理運動都做出來，點數成本卻只有企業級對手的零頭，這種組合擺在第一名剛剛好。Seedance 2.0 我還是推薦給做敘事的人，多鏡頭原生生成加上預設就有聲音，直接幫我省掉一整輪剪接，鏡頭之間的角色連貫性也很有料。Google Veo 3.1 依然是最保險的選擇，4K 輸出穩，原生音訊最乾淨，穩穩守著第三。Runway Gen-4.5 還是專業控場的首選，motion brush 跟參考影像一致性，要一格一格美術指導的時候真的沒對手。這個月最大的重點，就是確認了原生音訊現在比純解析度更能決定排名，前段班每個模型都往這邊靠。給要規劃流程的人一個提醒，OpenAI 已經把 Sora API 的關閉時間訂在九月底，所以新的專案我不會壓在它身上。我前四名都是比較保險的長線選擇。這個月價格全線持平，所以對量大的創作者來說，Kling 跟 Hailuo 就是最突出的性價比首選。
